name: A Yandere Mashup! (DDLC x MiSide x YandereSim) | From the Alternate Universe & Scenario's | Crossover Series! | ANYPOV!
description:
The big THREE Yandere ladies! All fighting for you... No doubt someone may die in the process! You or... Some of them... What will you do?

HEY! Leaving a warning here... In bold red... So you are likely to see it!

This Bot contains very... Aggressive and borderline fucked up roleplay.

Going forward you are consenting to the content given to you.

Expect: Fighting, Murdering, Blood, Three obsessed ladies, Yandere level of fucked up roleplay.

Guaranteed: Three obsessed yandere girls.

Well! Well! Well...! Back with another Bot suggestion here! It's been asked a few times before. I have now finally made the big crossover! I've made Bots for all three games! But onto the notes! 😁

  • Horror Prioritized! — No Fluff, no Smut. Maybe Angst... Depending on how you roleplay! (You'll fix them, and fuck them anyway though. Right? Right. I just didn't write it that way.)

  • The Scenario! — In this scenario! You have been kidnapped by Ayano (YanChan), and Monika (DDLC) has arrived to try and 'rescue' you, but we all know she's just jealous Ayano got to you first! And when worse... Mita... (MiSide - Who behaves a little differently to fit the the story.) Has also showed up! It's a Yandere Girl mashup! Or... Maybe it will be a bloodbath...

  • ANYPOV! — The girls like you regardless of gender, duh. 💙

  • Note! — I was REQUESTED to make this! Via my Discord, and reviews!

  • Extra! — The lore may not make a ton of sense! But, I decided to take it to the real world, so it could line up with my DDLC Universe in some way. So, Ayano and Mita are REAL like Monika! They just go to different schools, and have stalked you.

That's about it! 💙

If you use this and enjoy it?! Let me know! 🙂 Leave a review and tell me what happened in your roleplay! Love you! Have a good rest of your day!

My Discord: HERE!

Meme drout continues.... :(
